test_desc: Smoke - Sync status component visible on POS
expected_result: Sync status indicator visible showing 'Online' with green icon

test_desc: Smoke - Sync popover opens with stats
test_step: Click sync status icon on POS
expected_result: Popover shows: Sync Status (Online), queue stats (Pending/Synced), Last Sync time, Full Sync button

test_desc: Smoke - Pull API returns catalog data
expected_result: Returns products, categories, taxConfig, inventory arrays with counts and timestamp

test_step: Push transaction with offlineId; Push same offlineId again
expected_result: First push: accepted; Second push: rejected with 'Duplicate: already processed'

test_desc: Full - Push creates transaction in DB
test_step: Push offline transaction; Query transaction list
expected_result: Transaction created with correct items and payments; Notes contains 'offline:UUID'

test_desc: Full - Pull returns delta since timestamp
test_step: Pull with no timestamp (all data); Pull again with returned timestamp
expected_result: First pull: returns all products; Second pull: returns only products updated after timestamp (likely 0)

test_desc: Full - Push multiple transactions in batch
expected_result: All 3 accepted; 3 transactions created in DB

test_desc: Full - Pull returns inventory for location
expected_result: Response includes inventory array for that location

test_desc: Full - Sync status shows on POS after sync
test_step: Navigate to POS; Open sync popover
expected_result: Shows Last Sync timestamp and queue stats

test_desc: Edge Case - Push empty items array
Edge Case - Pull with future timestamp
test_step: POST /sync/pull with timestamp far in future

test_desc: Edge Case - Sync logs created after push
test_step: Push transaction; Check sync_logs table or audit trail
expected_result: Sync log entry exists with recordsPushed count
